impact: This gives PP&D its first deterministic permit-process model for the Single PDF Process, including ordered stages, PDF-only document requirements, file rules, consequential action gates, and citation-backed evidence without live crawling or DevHub automation.
summary: Add the missing Single PDF Process permit-process fixture and focused validation test that uses ppd/tests fixture-relative paths.
target_task: Task checkbox-24: Add a first permit-process fixture for the Single PDF Process with stages, required documents, file rules, and citation-backed evidence.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
